blended.narrative: Sunlight Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,023 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
